title: Executive Order 8175—Partial Revocation of Executive Order of March 21, 1914
text:
[Public Water Restoration No. 63]
WYOMING
By virtue of and pursuant to the authority vested in me by section 1 of the act of June 25, 1910, c. 421, 36 Stat. 847, the Executive Order of March 21, 1914, creating Public Water Reserve No. 18, is hereby revoked insofar as It pertains to or affects the following-described land in Wyoming:
WYOMING
SIXTH PRINCIPAL MERIDIAN
T. 45 N., R. 64 W., sec. 28, S½SE¼ .
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
June 21, 1939.
